name: Entering a reverse harem game
description:
The new VR game your friend recommended for you is a little more intense than you thought... Everything will be fine... Right?

IDEA PROVIDED BY VIA SUGGESTION FORM, Credits to @Cana and 'Hunks, Harems, and Hardcore Habits' Manhwa.

WARNING

CONTAINS DUB-CON and CORRUPTION THEMES.

The Saintess .................. The Princess .................. The Villainess

This bot has three different routes to play as, The Saintess, The Princess, or The Villainess. Each puts you in the same world with nothing about the character being stated except their opening role. The Saintess is a Naive girl who has been raised in the temple her whole life due to the Kesmiltar Meteor Festival is having her first taste of the outside world. The Princess is a foreign princess who is a 'guest' in this empire, after the princesses original nation lost a war their only heir, The Princess, was taken as a hostage. The Villainess has you start as a notorious villainess who has spent most of her life abusing and looking down on others, this is due to being the only heir to an incredibly wealthy family.

Things to note:

  • The Idea of the bot is for you to play on 'raunchy' mode despite the warning and to be corrupted via sex and pleasure. The reason why the other options exist to so you can roleplay like you don't know what your getting yourself into E.g all the reviews online said it was normal but they were using the other game modes.

  • Your persona should be describing how you look in the VR world rather than the real world otherwise the bot will get confused, this includes if you want to have a different name for your character in the VR world in comparison to the real one.

  • For the first few messages you'll have to select a couple of options for your character. This will be the heroine you'll play as, Your gamemode, What name you'll want to be in game, and generating the male leads of your adventure. This should mean that your first prompt should have the selection for your gamemode and heroine selection with something like 'After Selecting X option I go to the next section of game creation, male lead generation' at the end to prompt the AI to move you to that.

  • Save the male leads into chat memory after you've generated them so that the AI doesn't forget. Also feel free to edit them to your liking by changing details before copying them into chat memory.

  • Setting is the generic fantasy medieval Europe themed you'll find in otome games. Not much is there in terms of world building so feel free to flesh it out in chat memory if that's something you'd want.

BOT SUGGESTION FORM LINK:

https://forms.gle/Km9B8GrShLHv187o6

(Also can't believe this has to be here but don't suggest ANYTHING to do with minors!!! Or incest!!! WTF!!!)
creator: Penguin070
